headline: DR Power Breaks New Ground with Two New Additions to the Growing Commercial XD Series Lineup
summary: DR Power Equipment, a prominent producer of high-quality outdoor power equipment and a Generac Holdings Inc. (NYSE: GNRC) company, today launched two additions to the growing XD Series lineup- the XD20 Rototiller and the XD17 Stump Grinder. The expansion of DR Power's XD Series of commercial-grade machines reinforces the company's commitment to meeting the needs of discerning homeowners, professionals and the rental equipment sector.
